spec_match.rationale: Exercises a real surface of the spec's headline behaviour — clipboardchange event fires when system clipboard changes (own page, other apps, OS) — efficient alternative to polling…

interactive.rationale: Has 2 interactive control(s) wired to JS but the surface is thin — a single button or readout is barely past the static-card threshold.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Either the feature-index blurb or the concept lede is missing — can't verify alignment.

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles real failure modes — feature detection, permission rejection, fallback paths are all wired into the script.

references.rationale: Page includes the chromestatus.com/feature/5085102657503232 link in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: All colours come from the shared CSS variables and the layout follows the stage + controls editorial pattern.

accessibility.rationale: Every detected native or ARIA control now has a programmatic accessible name; toggle state is exposed where applicable.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh direct same-origin browser validation found no unnamed controls. Clipboard-only write denials in unfocused automated frames are environment restrictions, not hidden failures.

summary: Named clipboard route toggles and synchronized aria-pressed. Accessibility recheck passed.
